---
title: "Statistics and Probability for Engineering"
---

This an educational website where undergrad students of CSE, EEE, Textile engineering will able to learn:

-   Descriptive statistics,

-   Probability and probability distributions, their uses in real life

-   Transformation of random variables, bivariate distribution

-   Limit Theorems

-   Stochastic Processes-Bernoulli process, Poisson Process, Markov Chain, Birth and Death Process, Queuing Theory

-   Sampling distributions and parameter estimation in Classical Statistical Inference

-   Hypothesis testing

-   Analysis of variance (ANOVA)- one -factor and multi-factor ANOVA

-   Simple and Multiple Linear regression

-   Chi-squared Test of categorical data, Goodness Fit test

-   Statistical Quality Control

-   No-parametric test of hypothesis

-   Bayesian Statistical Inference
